## Code Style

PHP 8.4, Blade, Alpine.js (minimal), Livewire 4: Follow standard conventions

### Indentation Rule (MANDATORY)

- **All new and existing files must use 4 spaces for indentation** (not tabs, not 2 spaces).
- When modifying any file, enforce 4-space indentation across the entire file for consistency.
- Run `vendor/bin/pint --dirty` before finalizing changes to ensure compliance.
